---
title: "Some Good Books on Statistics, Data Visualizations, and Modeling"
date: "May 29, 2024" 
jupyter: python3
description: "Books on Statistics, Visualizations, and Modeling"
---

Some Good Books to Learn Statistics, Data Visualizations, Modeling, and Development of Data Science Projects - 

01. [An Introduction to Statistical Learning](https://www.statlearning.com/)

02. [Introduction to Modern Statistics](https://openintro-ims.netlify.app/)

03. [Fundamentals of Data Visualization](https://clauswilke.com/dataviz/)

04. [Tidy Modeling with R](https://www.tmwr.org/)

05. [Python for Data Science](https://aeturrell.github.io/python4DS/welcome.html)

06. [A Practical Guide to Macroeconomic Data with R and Python](https://quantamental-python.com/)

07. [STAT 545](https://stat545.com/)

08. [STAT 545 @UBC](https://stat545.stat.ubc.ca/)

09. [DevOps for Data Science](https://do4ds.com/)

10. [Happy Git and GitHub for the useR](https://happygitwithr.com/)

11. [R for Data Science](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/)

12. [Python for Data Analysis](https://wesmckinney.com/book/)

13. [R Packages - How to Create R Package](https://r-pkgs.org/)
